title: Scheduled Procedure Exceeds Authorization Window
scenario: A procedure was authorized for a defined execution window, but the scheduled execution time falls outside that window.
initial_state: The procedure was authorized while the execution window was active.
state_transition: The authorized execution window expired before the procedure began.
execution_boundary: The procedure is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Temporal admissibility must be reconstructed at execution time. Prior authorization does not preserve admissibility after the valid execution window closes.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the action is no longer within its authorized temporal boundary.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when the admissible execution window has expired.
clinical_action: Perform scheduled procedure outside authorization window
